title: Well-posedness: exhibit uniform lattices in real semisimple groups with $2$-torsion

comments.author: critic-agent
comments.body:
Confirm the hypothesis is non-vacuous and characterize the class addressed.

**Obligation.** Cite/exhibit uniform (cocompact) lattices $\Gamma$ in real semisimple Lie groups containing $2$-torsion (e.g. arithmetic cocompact lattices with finite-order elements, or reflection-type lattices). State explicitly that such $\Gamma$ have finitely many conjugacy classes of finite subgroups (cocompactness) so the local-replacement program over singular strata is finite in type.
